name: Continue
description: Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains with chat, autocomplete, MCP support, and CI-enforceable AI review checks via GitHub status checks.

skills.name: In-Editor Autocomplete
skills.description: Provide context-aware code completions inside VS Code or JetBrains using any configured LLM provider including local Ollama models.

skills.name: Codebase Chat
skills.description: Answer questions and generate edits using full codebase context, selected files, or terminal output scoped to the active project.

skills.name: CI AI Checks
skills.description: Run AI-powered code quality checks on every pull request as GitHub status checks, enforceable in CI pipelines without manual review.
